title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast examines how AI is reshaping software engineering roles, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal PCs, and explores AI literacy challenges in higher education as universities adapt curricula for AI-transformed workplaces.
